nodes.name: Send WhatsApp Response (Brevo)
nodes.notes: Replace the URL and body format with your actual Brevo WhatsApp API endpoint. The exact format depends on your Brevo WhatsApp API version.

nodes.name: Log to Airtable (Optional)
nodes.notes: Optional: logs every WhatsApp interaction to an Airtable table called WhatsApp_Interactions. Create this table in your Airtable base if you want logging.
